title: CLAUDE.md — GAO / Republican Revolution
text: Title: Republican Revolution Hamstring Congressional Oversight? Evidence 55,000 GAO Reports Author: Jack Rametta (solo) Status: Revising (back review) Presented: MPSA 2024 R package (gao) automated harvesting processing Government Accountability Office reports, plus accompanying research paper analyzing congressional oversight patterns.

title: CLAUDE.md — GAO / Republican Revolution
text: R/ — Package source code (web scraping, PDF/HTML downloading) man/ — R documentation

title: CLAUDE.md — GAO / Republican Revolution
text: R package using rvest (scraping), furrr/future (parallel processing), httr (HTTP requests).

title: CLAUDE.md — GAO / Republican Revolution
text: canonical project tracker lives ~/Dropbox/chief_of_staff/CHIEF_OF_STAFF.md.

title: CLAUDE.md — GAO / Republican Revolution
text: Jack says “update COS” end session: accomplished session changed (status shifts, blockers added/removed) next action Append ## Raw Updates section bottom ~/Dropbox/chief_of_staff/CHIEF_OF_STAFF.md using format: Confirm Jack update appended. read, parse, reorganize rest state file. Just append. CoS agent handles integration.

what: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata
title: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata
text: package gao provides tools downloading reports associated metadata published United States Government Accountability Office (GAO). ships bundled dataset covering 55,000 reports (1921–present, updated daily) one-step function batch downloading reports PDF, HTML, . Disclaimer: package affiliated , endorsed , way officially connected U.S. Government Accountability Office. data obtained public web pages gao.gov.

title: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata
text: gao requires curl-impersonate system dependency (GAO.gov uses TLS fingerprint filtering blocks standard HTTP clients). install package:
code: # Arch Linux sudo pacman -S curl-impersonate  # macOS brew install lexiforest/curl-impersonate/curl-impersonate # From CRAN (when available) install.packages("gao")  # Development version from GitHub # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("CetiAlphaFive/gao")

title: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata
text: auto_download() loads bundled dataset, filters fiscal year, downloads PDFs, HTMLs, gao_reports/pdf/ gao_reports/html/.
code: library(gao)  # Interactive --- prompts for format and year range auto_download()  # Or specify everything up front auto_download(format = "pdf", year = 2020:2024, confirm = FALSE)

what: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
text: Convenience wrapper loads bundled report links, optionally filters fiscal year, downloads reports PDF, HTML, . Use format = "metadata" export CSV report metadata without downloading files.

title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
code: auto_download(   format = NULL,   year = NULL,   download_dir = "gao_reports",   sleep_time = 1,   confirm = TRUE )

title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
text: format Character. "pdf", "html", "", "metadata". "metadata" writes CSV report metadata without downloading files. NULL (default) prompts interactively; non-interactive sessions defaults "pdf". year Integer vector 4-digit fiscal years, e.g. 2024 2020:2024. NULL (default) prompts interactively; non-interactive sessions uses available years. download_dir Character. Base directory downloads. pdf/ /html/ subdirectories created beneath . sleep_time Numeric. Seconds pause downloads. confirm Logical. TRUE (default), prompts confirmation downloading. non-interactive sessions, confirm = TRUE raises error prevent accidental mass downloads — set confirm = FALSE explicitly.

title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
text: "pdf", "html", "": invisible character vector downloaded file paths. "metadata": invisible path written CSV.

title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
text: PDF URLs constructed directly report IDs (e.g., /products/gao-24-106198 becomes /assets/gao-24-106198.pdf) rather scraping report page, extra HTTP requests needed link extraction.

title: Download GAO Reports in One Step — auto_download
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Interactive: walks through prompts auto_download()  # Non-interactive: download 2024 PDFs auto_download(format = "pdf", year = 2024, confirm = FALSE)  # Export metadata only (no file downloads) auto_download(format = "metadata", year = 2020:2024, confirm = FALSE) } # }

what: Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
title: Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
text: extract_pdf_links() deprecated. Use auto_download() instead, constructs PDF URLs directly report IDs without extra HTTP requests.

title: Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
text: page_links Character vector. Full URLs GAO report pages. sleep_time Numeric. Seconds pause requests (default: 1).

title: Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
text: character vector unique PDF paths (relative gao.gov).

title: Extract PDF Links from GAO Report Pages — extract_pdf_links
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Deprecated --- use auto_download() instead auto_download(format = "pdf", year = 2024, confirm = FALSE) } # }

what: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
title: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
text: Reads PDF files local directory extracts text content using pdftools::pdf_text(). Designed work PDFs downloaded via auto_download().

title: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
text: pdf_dir Character. Path directory containing PDF files. pattern Character. Regex pattern filter filenames (default: "\\.pdf$"). verbose Logical. Show progress messages (default: TRUE).

title: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
text: data.frame columns: file Character. PDF filename (without directory path). text Character. extracted text, pages collapsed single string separated newlines. pages Integer. number pages PDF.

title: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
text: Requires pdftools package. Install install.packages("pdftools") already available. Files fail parse (e.g., scanned/image-PDFs) included result NA text NA pages along warning.

title: Extract Text from GAO PDF Reports — extract_text
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # After downloading PDFs auto_download(format = "pdf", year = 2024, download_dir = "gao_reports") texts <- extract_text("gao_reports/pdf") head(texts$file) nchar(texts$text[1]) } # }

what: gao: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata — gao-package
title: gao: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata — gao-package
text: complete library reports metadata U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO). Ships bundled dataset GAO report URLs provides functions downloading reports PDF HTML.

title: gao: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata — gao-package
text: package affiliated endorsed U.S. Government Accountability Office. data obtained public web pages https://www.gao.gov.

title: gao: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata — gao-package
text: Requires curl-impersonate installed. GAO.gov uses TLS fingerprint filtering blocks standard HTTP clients.

title: gao: A Complete Library of GAO Reports and Metadata — gao-package
text: Maintainer: Jack T. Rametta jtrametta@gmail.com (ORCID) [copyright holder]

title: Get GAO Report Data — gao_links
text: Returns data.frame GAO report metadata. Checks user-local cache (written gao_update_data()) first, falls back bundled dataset. Indicator columns (82 one-hot columns topics agencies) computed fly cached memory.

title: Get GAO Report Data — gao_links
Get GAO Report Data — gao_links
text: data.frame columns: url, title, report_id, published, released, summary, page_count (integer, may NA reports without matching PDF bundled archive), topics, subject_terms, has_recommendations (logical), n_recommendations (integer), has_matters (logical), n_matters (integer), agencies_affected (character, semicolon-separated), plus 82 integer indicator columns: 31 topic_* columns (one per topic), 50 agency_* columns (one per top-50 agency), agency_other (1 non-top-50 agency appears). Indicator columns NA_integer_ source field missing.

what: Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
title: Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
text: Downloads latest gao_links.rds package's GitHub Releases caches locally. Subsequent calls gao_links() use updated data. Uses base R download.file() — curl-impersonate needed.

title: Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
text: quiet Logical. Suppress progress messages (default: FALSE).

title: Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
text: Invisible path cached RDS file.

title: Download Updated GAO Report Data — gao_update_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ gao_update_data() gao_links()  # now returns the latest data } # }

title: gao 0.5.0
text: CRAN preparation release. Bundled RDS shrunk 6.4 MB 3.7 MB storing 14 core columns xz compression. 82 indicator columns now computed fly gao_links() cached memory. New gao_update_data() function downloads latest data GitHub Releases using base R download.file() — curl-impersonate needed. gao_links() checks user-local cached data bundled copy. auto_download() now offers check updated data interactive sessions proceeding. Daily CI workflow now uploads RDS pinned GitHub Release (data-latest) gao_update_data() fetch. Fixed missing lifecycle-deprecated.svg badge referenced extract_pdf_links.Rd. Updated CITATION.cff match current version license.

title: gao 0.4.0
text: New extract_text() function extracting text downloaded PDFs. Requires pdftools (added Suggests). Bundled dataset now includes page_count, topics, subject_terms columns. gao_links() returns 9-column data.frame. Full metadata backfill: title, published, released now 100% populated across 56,000+ reports. summary 97.5%. Missing report_id values filled URL slugs (now 100% complete). Page counts extracted 55,000+ PDF archive matched metadata via URL slug report ID (80.7% coverage). Daily CI workflow now backfills page_count newly added reports. Fixed update_links() column mismatch bundled data columns new scrape results lack. License changed MIT GPL (>= 3).

title: gao 0.3.0
text: Breaking: gao_links() now returns data.frame columns url, title, report_id, published, released, summary instead character vector. Bundled dataset switched text (.txt) RDS (.rds) compression rich metadata. Year filtering auto_download() now uses published date fiscal year calculation instead regex report IDs, fixing ~29% reports legacy ID formats previously yielded NA years. extract_links() update_links() now return data.frames full report metadata. Fixed R-CMD-check GitHub Action syntax error (args parameter).

title: gao 0.2.0
text: Added auto_download() convenience wrapper handles full pipeline (load links, filter year, download PDF/HTML) one call. PDF URLs now constructed directly report IDs, avoiding one HTTP request per report compared extract_pdf_links(). Interactive prompts format year range arguments omitted. Non-interactive safety: confirm = TRUE errors unless explicitly set FALSE, preventing accidental mass downloads.

title: gao 0.1.0
text: Initial release. Bundled dataset ~55,000 GAO report URLs (1921–present). gao_links() access bundled report URLs. update_links() scrape newly published reports. extract_links() build full link list scratch. extract_pdf_links() find PDF download links report pages. download_pdfs() download_htmls() batch downloading. Requires ‘curl-impersonate’ TLS fingerprint compatibility.
